name: Dead Shard Archive
description: Rows of dead media sit in cold sleeves while the air tastes like dust, coolant, and litigation.
detail: Every shelf here is a blackmail file waiting for a buyer patient enough to ask.

fixtures.name: cold shelves
fixtures.inspect: The shelves are labelled in a dead filing scheme that still feels capable of ruining lives.

fixtures.name: dead terminal
fixtures.inspect: The dead terminal at the back of the archive looks abandoned, but the cursor blinks if you stand near it long enough to be remembered.

mood: The cooling lines are cycling harder than the temperature warrants.
Tonight three sleeves on shelf D have had their dust disturbed and put back without quite matching.
The dead terminal at the back is humming on a frequency the rest of the room is pretending not to hear.
